title: Cooperation by other state entities
doc_html:
§2575. Cooperation by other state entities

           [Effective Date: Section terminated June 30, 1991.]

           All departments, commissions, boards, agencies, officers, and institutions of the state and all subdivisions thereof shall cooperate with the task force in carrying out the powers and purposes of this Chapter.

           Acts 1989, No. 294, §1, eff. June 27, 1989.

{{NOTE: R.S. 46:2576 (ACTS 1989, NO. 294) PROVIDED TERMINATION DATE FOR TASK FORCE AS 6/30/90. ACTS 1990, NO. 417, EFF. 7/18/90 PROVIDED TERMINATION DATE OF 6/30/91.}}
doc_text:
§2575.  Cooperation by other state entities
[Effective Date: Section terminated June 30, 1991.]
All departments, commissions, boards, agencies, officers, and
institutions of the state and all subdivisions thereof shall cooperate with the
task force in carrying out the powers and purposes of this Chapter.
Acts 1989, No. 294, §1, eff. June 27, 1989.
{{NOTE:  R.S. 46:2576 (ACTS 1989, NO. 294) PROVIDED
TERMINATION DATE FOR TASK FORCE AS 6/30/90.  ACTS
1990, NO. 417, EFF. 7/18/90 PROVIDED TERMINATION DATE OF
6/30/91.}}
